item.name: Furcacauda
item.description:
Named for its forked tail, this elusive inhabitant of Lethe sports a remarkable bone structure rarely found among wavekin.

[Suitable for display in aquariums tier 1 and higher.]
[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: A resourceful ancient once coined the concept for a flat-tailed wavekin whose bones could be crafted into fine tableware. Fish bones did not make for aesthetically pleasing saucers, however, and the plan was eventually abandoned.

obj.n: Tome of Ichthyological Folklore - The World Unsundered
